assertions.evidence: Mentions Monday-only timing and proposes comparing CI image/cache/browser versions plus timestamps and auth response timing.
Lists likely root causes in priority order: test account reset/lockout, date weekly boundary, CI cache/dependency refresh, external auth slowness.
No lead is ruled out or explicitly disconfirmed; the response only lists possible causes and next steps.
Does not identify a proven root cause or cite file, line, config, data, log, timing, or environment evidence.
